name: Kindom Development Co., Ltd.
summary: Kindom Development Co., Ltd. engages in the real estate development business. The company develops residential properties; leases and sells commercial buildings; undertakes construction projects, such as corporate headquarters, civil workshops, medical buildings and residential buildings, as well as civil projects, including land preparation and rezoning, roads and bridges; and operates department stores and supermarkets. It also engages in the installation and engineering of electrical and fire safety equipment; and investment and operation of shopping malls, as well as non-store retailing business. In addition, the company offers business management and consulting; corporate marketing planning; conference; exhibition; parking lot operation and management services. Further, it is involved in the general investment activities. Kindom Development Co., Ltd. was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.
